tasks.label: Build and Run DhakaDash
tasks.command: g++ -std=c++17 -Iinclude -Ithird_party/freeglut/include src/main.cpp src/Game.cpp src/Player.cpp src/ObstacleManager.cpp src/Renderer.cpp -Lthird_party/freeglut/lib -o DhakaDash.exe -lfreeglut -lopengl32 -lglu32 -lwinmm; if ($?) { if (Test-Path third_party/freeglut/bin/freeglut.dll) { Copy-Item third_party/freeglut/bin/freeglut.dll . -Force }; if (Test-Path third_party/freeglut/bin/libfreeglut.dll) { Copy-Item third_party/freeglut/bin/libfreeglut.dll . -Force }; start DhakaDash.exe }

tasks.label: Build and Run DhakaDash (Single File)
tasks.command: g++ -std=c++17 -Iinclude -Ithird_party/freeglut/include main_single_file.cpp -Lthird_party/freeglut/lib -o DhakaDashSingle.exe -lfreeglut -lopengl32 -lglu32 -lwinmm; if ($?) { if (Test-Path third_party/freeglut/bin/freeglut.dll) { Copy-Item third_party/freeglut/bin/freeglut.dll . -Force }; if (Test-Path third_party/freeglut/bin/libfreeglut.dll) { Copy-Item third_party/freeglut/bin/libfreeglut.dll . -Force }; start DhakaDashSingle.exe }
